name: Merit Lending
description_short: Family-owned mortgage brokerage founded in 2013, operating from Las Vegas with access to multiple lenders and specialized loan programs across five states.
description_long:
Merit Lending is a family-owned mortgage brokerage established in 2013 and headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada. Founded by Kelly Graham, who brings 25+ years of industry experience in southern Nevada, the company operates as a brokerage model rather than a direct lender. This positioning allows them to partner with multiple lending sources to serve borrowers across Nevada, California, Utah, Texas, and Florida, with the ability to serve clients in all 50 states plus DC according to their website map.

The company offers mortgage services including home purchase loans, refinancing, and access to specialized loan programs not typically available through traditional banks. They provide online application capabilities, rate quotes, and loan consultations through their team. Merit Lending emphasizes educational resources, maintaining a learning center with 27 articles covering home-buying topics and mortgage fundamentals. Their services include mortgage calculators (with appropriate disclaimers about accuracy limitations) and personalized loan consulting through named account managers.

Merit Lending differentiates itself through several specific claims: family ownership, longevity (founded 2013), access to non-bank loan programs, competitive rate positioning, and individualized service. Google reviews (139 reviews, 5.0 rating) highlight specific loan officers by name (Martha, James, Camille, Vill, Cody, Sam, Liz), suggesting a personalized service model. The company explicitly positions itself on superior rates combined with customer service, targeting borrowers who may have been declined elsewhere or need specialized loan programs.

The honest assessment: Merit Lending is a legitimate mortgage brokerage with verifiable online presence, positive customer reviews, and transparent disclaimers about loan qualification and rate variability. However, they are a mortgage brokerage, not a direct lender, meaning rates and terms depend on partnered lenders. Their service area (though claiming nationwide) is primarily concentrated in five states. No specific information about loan limits, minimum credit scores, or unique underwriting criteria is provided on their public website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned and operated since 2013 with founder having 25+ years of industry experience
Brokerage model provides access to multiple lenders and specialized loan programs not available at banks
Serves five states with nationwide capability (all 50 states plus DC according to service map)
Strong Google review rating of 5.0 stars with 139 reviews praising specific named loan officers
Educational resource center with 27 articles on home buying and mortgage fundamentals
Online application and quote tools available for convenience
Transparent disclaimers about calculator limitations and loan qualification requirements
cons: As a brokerage, actual rates and terms depend on third-party lending partners, not directly controlled
Limited public information about loan minimums, maximum loan amounts, or credit score requirements
Primary service concentration in five states (NV, CA, UT, TX, FL) despite nationwide claims
No published information about specific loan programs, pricing, or competitive rate benchmarks
Online reviews are from Google only; limited transparency about complaint resolution or regulatory status
best_for: Borrowers in Nevada, California, Utah, Texas, and Florida seeking personalized mortgage service
Home buyers or refinancers who may need non-traditional or specialized loan programs
Applicants who value education and detailed explanation throughout the loan process
Borrowers seeking to work with named, consistent loan officers for accountability
diagnosis: Merit Lending is best suited for borrowers in its primary service states (NV, CA, UT, TX, FL) who value personalized service and may need loan programs outside traditional bank offerings. The main caveat is that as a brokerage, actual rates and terms are subject to partnered lender approval and pricing—the rates advertised depend entirely on which lender ultimately funds the loan, and no rate guarantees are published.
services: Access to loan programs unavailable at traditional banks
Personalized loan consultation with account managers
Bilingual support (English and Spanish indicated on website)
Multi-state lending across NV, CA, UT, TX, FL
FHA and VA loan options (implied in standard mortgage brokerage offerings)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 9960 W Cheyenne Ave #240, Las Vegas, NV 89129
